descriptions: Islamic Legion and Tajammu al-Arabi shared members and support.
edges.evidence_quote: The two organizations shared members and a source of support, and the distinction between them is often ambiguous.

descriptions: The Belforte clan joined the Nuova Camorra Speciale.
edges.evidence_quote: Nuova Camorra Speciale, alla quale aderì anche il clan Belforte

descriptions: Most groups of the Nuova Camorra Speciale ended up gravitating around the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: la maggior parte di tali gruppi finì col gravitare attorno al clan dei Casalesi

descriptions: The Nuova Camorra Speciale threatened the Vesuvian Camorra of Fabbrocino and Orefice.
edges.evidence_quote: insidia la camorra vesuviana di Fabbrocino e Orefice

descriptions: The Nuova Camorra Speciale had dialogue with the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: dialoga anche con l'altra sponda, quella dei Mazzarella

descriptions: The Nuova Camorra Speciale threatened the Vesuvian Camorra of Fabbrocino and Orefice.
edges.evidence_quote: insidia la camorra vesuviana di Fabbrocino e Orefice

Parisi-Palermiti clan.description: The Parisi-Palermiti clan is a criminal organization originating from Bari, Italy, with its stronghold in the Japigia neighborhood. Founded in the 1980s by Savino Parisi and Eugenio Palermiti, it controls drug trafficking, extortion, and other illegal activities. The clan has infiltrated businesses and local politics, and has been involved in conflicts with rival groups. Despite the imprisonment of its founder, the organization remains active under the leadership of Eugenio Palermiti.

descriptions: Parisi-Palermiti clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli 'ndrina , Mancuso 'ndrina , Pesce 'ndrina , Camorra , Capriati clan , Parisi-Palermiti clan

descriptions: Parisi-Palermiti clan is listed as an ally of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Parisi-Palermiti clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina

descriptions: The Parisi-Palermiti clan supported the Capriati clan in an illegal gambling operation.
edges.evidence_quote: the creation of a real holding company for illegal gambling that had generated an estimated turnover of €1 billion and also had the support of Tommaso Parisi, son of Savino Parisi , head of the Parisi-Palermiti clan , a historic ally of the Capriati clan.

descriptions: Clan Parisi is a historical ally of Clan Capriati, providing support.
edges.evidence_quote: ha avuto anche il sostegno di Tommaso Parisi, figlio di Savino Parisi, boss del clan Parisi, storico alleato dei Capriati.

descriptions: Savino Parisi had close ties with 'Ndrangheta for drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme a Savino Parisi, aveva stretti legami con la 'Ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Parisi-Palermiti clan and 'Ndrangheta cooperated in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: an international drug trafficking operation involving the Bari-based Parisi-Palermiti clan, the 'Ndrangheta, and Serbian criminal networks has been thwarted

descriptions: The Bellocco 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Capriati clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina , Albanian mafia

descriptions: Parisi and Capriati clans jointly set fire to Teatro Petruzzelli in 1991.
edges.evidence_quote: la notte del 27 ottobre 1991 i clan Parisi e Capriati incendiarono il celebre Teatro Petruzzelli di Bari

descriptions: The Capriati clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Capriati clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina , Albanian mafia

descriptions: The Di Cosola clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Capriati clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina , Albanian mafia

descriptions: The Mercante-Diomede clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Capriati clan , Mercante-Diomede clan , Di Cosola clan , Bellocco 'ndrina , Albanian mafia

descriptions: The Parisi clan and Palermiti clan merged in 2017 to form a joint criminal society to fight against a splinter group.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2017 al clan Parisi si è unito il clan Palermiti, dando vita a una 'società della guerra', nata per sostenere il conflitto scoppiato nel quartiere contro la compagine 'scissionista' capeggiata da Antonio Busco

descriptions: The Palermiti clan merged with the Parisi clan to form a joint criminal society.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 2017, the Palermiti clan has joined the Parisi clan, giving life to a 'war society'

descriptions: Parisi and Mercante dissociated from Sacra Corona Unita in 1986.
edges.evidence_quote: Anche Parisi e Mercante si dissociarono dalla Sacra Corona Unita nel 1986

descriptions: The Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Strisciuglio clan

descriptions: Parisi-Palermiti clan cooperated with Serbian traffickers (Zemun clan).
edges.evidence_quote: The Parisi-Palermiti clan had established direct contacts with Serbian traffickers

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Parisi-Palermiti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Parisi-Palermiti clan

Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan.description: The Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan was a Sicilian Mafia clan originating from Siculiana, Sicily, founded in the 1950s. It held a key position in international drug trafficking and money laundering for Cosa Nostra during the 1980s and 1990s, with operations extending to Canada and Venezuela. The clan was described by Italian prosecutors as an 'international holding' providing drug-trafficking routes and money-laundering channels. It was considered defunct by the 2000s.

descriptions: Cataldo clan cooperated with Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan in cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The Cataldo clan was also involved in cocaine trafficking from Colombia with the Sicilian Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan

descriptions: The Mazzaferro conducted drug trafficking together with the Cuntrera-Caruana in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Il commercio di stupefacenti negli anni '90 è stato fatto insieme ad alcune 'ndrine di Gioiosa Jonica e del clan siciliano agrigentino dei Cuntrera-Caruana.

descriptions: The clan supplied cocaine to 'Ndrangheta families.
edges.evidence_quote: They became seriously involved when a joint venture of 'Ndrangheta families needed Alfonso Caruana to supply them.

descriptions: The clan was involved in heroin trafficking with the Bonanno family.
edges.evidence_quote: the middleman between the buyers of the Gambino and Bonanno crime families in New York and the Sicilian clans

descriptions: The infobox lists Cali Cartel as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cali Cartel

descriptions: The clan acted as intermediary between the Cali Cartel and 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Caruana brought together the cocaine suppliers of the Cali Cartel with the Italian distributors from the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria.

descriptions: The infobox lists Corleonesi as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Corleonesi

descriptions: The clan cooperated with the Gambino family in heroin trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: John Gambino of the Gambino Family in New York City took care of the other 200 kilograms.

descriptions: The infobox lists La Corporación as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Corporación

descriptions: The infobox lists Rizzuto crime family as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rizzuto crime family

descriptions: The Gambino family and Cuntrera-Caruana clan shared a 400-kg heroin shipment, indicating cooperation in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan received half of the load, while John Gambino took possession of the other 200 kilograms.

descriptions: The Musitano family supports the Cuntrera-Caruana clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The wiretaps of Domenico and Joe Violi recorded a discussion that the Musitanos were supporting the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan

descriptions: The Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rizzuto crime family, Independent Soldiers, West End Gang, Hells Angels, Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan, Various other crime families and gangs

descriptions: Musitanos supported the Cuntrera-Caruana clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Court records from a 2018 matter against Domenico and Giuseppe 'Joe' Violi of the Luppino crime family discuss a claim that the Musitanos were supporting the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan who have roots in Montreal and Toronto.

descriptions: Rizzuto family allied with Cuntrera-Caruana clan in Venezuela.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rizzuto family along with their allies in the Cuntrera-Caruana clan were major players in the economy of Venezuela

descriptions: Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan brokered links between Solntsevskaya and Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization is also involved in the international cocaine trade, with its links to Colombian drug cartels brokered by the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan.

descriptions: Broncos are a Hells Angels support club.
edges.evidence_quote: On 11 May 2019, Bandidos members clashed with members of the Zürich Hells Angels chapter and the Broncos – a Hells Angels support club from Bern – in Belp .

'Ndrina Petullà.description: The Petullà are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cinquefrondi, Italy. Active since the 1980s in international drug trafficking, they have members in northern Italy, France, Germany, Peru, and Australia. The clan has been involved in feuds with rival 'ndrine such as the Foriglio and has been targeted in multiple police operations.

descriptions: The Petullà and Foriglio were in a feud (faida) starting in 1987.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1987 viene ucciso il boss Raffaele Petullà e scoppia la, poi nominata, faida di Cinquefrondi con la 'ndrina dei Foriglio.

descriptions: The Petullà (Ieraci-Petullà) and Squillace cooperated in drug trafficking, as shown by the operation Alba e tramonto.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto della polizia di Reggio Calabria e Polistena con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà di Cinquefrondi e Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: The Petullà (Ieraci-Petullà) cooperated with Nirta-Strangio in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto della polizia di Reggio Calabria e Polistena con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà di Cinquefrondi e Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

Baxter Street Dudes.description: The Baxter Street Dudes was a New York City teenage street gang active in the 1870s, consisting of former newsboys and bootblacks. Founded by Baby-Face Willie, they operated the Grand Duke's Theatre from a basement on Baxter Street, which became their headquarters and a popular underworld hangout. The gang wrote and performed plays, musicals, and variety shows, and engaged in tax evasion, thievery, and charity.

descriptions: The infobox lists Mulberry Blend as a rival of the Baxter Street Dudes.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mulberry Blend

descriptions: Hells Angels waged war against Outcasts.
edges.evidence_quote: During the late 1990s, the Hells Angels waged a two-year war against the Outcasts biker gang, which was centred in London and East Anglia.

descriptions: Lone Legion is a member of the A-Team alliance with Outcasts MC.
edges.evidence_quote: According to media and Police the club is a member of the "A-Team", an alliance between several NZ biker groups including the Outcasts MC, the Epitaph Riders MC, the Forty-Fives MC, the Southern Vikings MC, Satan's Slaves MC, Sinn Fein MC and the Lost Breed MC .

descriptions: Outcasts aligned with Outlaws after disbanding.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outcasts disbanded as a result of the conflict, aligning themselves with the Midlands Outlaws and joining the February 2000 'patch over' to the American Outlaws Association.

descriptions: Ruthless Crip Gangsters shot at a MOD member's home.
edges.evidence_quote: Several members of the Ruthless Crip Gangsters drove to the Eau Claire home of a member of the gang Menace of Destruction. Three to five shots were fired at a man after a verbal confrontation, one shot narrowly missing his head.

'Ndrina Santaiti.description: The Santaiti are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Seminara, Calabria, Italy. They emerged as a dominant force in the area after winning a feud against the Pellegrino clan in the 1970s. The clan is also present in Liguria and is considered one of the hegemonic 'ndrine of Seminara alongside the Gioffrè. They remain active, with Carmine Demetrio Santaiti as the alleged current boss.

descriptions: Gioffrè, Santaiti, and Romeo are the dominant 'ndrine of Seminara, acting together.
edges.evidence_quote: I Gioffrè , insieme ai Santaiti e ai Romeo, sono le 'ndrine egemoni di Seminara.

descriptions: Brindisi is listed as an allied 'ndrina of Santaiti.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Brindisi

descriptions: Caia is listed as an allied 'ndrina of Santaiti.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Caia

descriptions: Santaiti and Gioffrè are jointly the hegemonic 'ndrine of Seminara, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: I Santaiti , insieme ai Gioffrè , sono le 'ndrine egemoni di Seminara

descriptions: Santaiti won a feud against Pellegrino in the 1970s, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 vincono la faida di Seminara contro la 'ndrina dei Pellegrino.

descriptions: Grupo Bravo del CDG is a faction of the Cartel del Golfo that allied with Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: alianza entre dos facciones del cártel de los Zetas y El Cártel del Golfo, Grupo Operativo Zeta, y Grupo Bravo del CDG

descriptions: The Khmer Rouge dominated the GRUNK government-in-exile, with Sihanouk as nominal head.
edges.evidence_quote: Sihanouk made an alliance with the Khmer Rouge on the advice of CCP, and became the nominal head of a Khmer Rouge–dominated government-in-exile (known by its French acronym GRUNK) backed by China.

Baybaşin family.description: Kurdish crime syndicate founded around 1960 in Lice, Turkey by Mehmet Sait Baybaşin. Known for heroin production and trafficking, operating in Turkey and Western Europe. Once called 'the most dangerous men in Europe' by the British Home Office. Currently led by Abdullah Baybaşin.

descriptions: The Arifs are rivals with the Baybaşin family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Baybaşin family

descriptions: The Baybaşin family commands and financially supports the Hackney Bombers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hackney Bombers, a Kurdish gang in the United Kingdom under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, came to prominence following clashes with the Turkish-controlled Tottenham Turks gang. The Hackney Bombers, armed and financially supported by the Baybaşins, attacked a restaurant owned by Tottenham Turks with a group of masked thugs on motorbikes and AK-47s.

descriptions: The Baybaşin family is allied with the Kurdistan Workers' Party.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kurdistan Workers' Party , Kurdish mafia

descriptions: Nuovo Ordine Sociale-Sole Nero is a splinter group of Nuovo Ordine Sociale.
edges.evidence_quote: a splinter group of the Italian Atomwaffen "Nuovo Ordine Sociale-Sole Nero"

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with 135th St Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

descriptions: Los Linces was the shock group of Cártel de Juárez.
edges.evidence_quote: Era el grupo de choque del cártel compuesto por desertores de las fuerzas especiales del Ejército.

Vineland Boys.description: Hispanic American street gang based in the San Fernando Valley, Los Angeles, founded in January 1988 by former 18th Street gang members. The gang has approximately 300 members and is part of the Sureño coalition. It has alliances with Armenian Power and the Abergil crime family, and ties to the Sinaloa Cartel. The gang was involved in the 2003 murder of Burbank Police Officer Matthew Pavelka, leading to a large-scale crackdown.

descriptions: Vineland Boys is a rival of 18th Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues, Mara Salvatrucha, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Temple Street (gang), Vineland Boys, Florencia 13, Bloods, Black P. Stones (Jungles)

descriptions: Abergil organization cooperated with Vineland Boys for expansion in the US.
edges.evidence_quote: US federal prosecutors claim that when the Abergils wished to expand their mob syndicate in the US, they turned for help to an upstart Latino street gang known as the Vineland Boys.

descriptions: Abergil crime family hired Vineland Boyz to commit a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: he hired members of the Vineland Boyz street gang based in North Hollywood, to kill Sami Atias

descriptions: Vineland Boys is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Vineland Boys

descriptions: Los Vineland Boys son aliados de Armenian Power según infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Vineland Boys

descriptions: Vineland Boys is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Vineland Boys was founded by former members of 18th Street gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Vineland Boys gang was founded in [Sun Valley, Los Angeles] in January 1988 by former members and associates of the 18th Street gang.

descriptions: Vineland Boys allied with Abergil crime family for protection and cooperation in ecstasy trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The Vineland Boys have formed alliances with Armenian Power and the Abergil crime family. The gang allegedly first teamed up with Abergils in 2000, offering protection and cooperation to the Israeli mafia's ecstasy trafficking ring operating in their territory.

descriptions: Vineland Boys formed an alliance with Armenian Power.
edges.evidence_quote: The Vineland Boys have formed alliances with Armenian Power and the Abergil crime family.

descriptions: Vineland Boys were in conflict with the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Boys' feud with the Mexican Mafia, known as "La Eme", sent the Boys looking for a new source of drugs, which the Israelis provided.

descriptions: Vineland Boys clashed with Mexican Mafia until 1998.
edges.evidence_quote: the Vineland Boys also clashed with the Mexican Mafia until the gang's founder Teddy Lopez y Alberto Ruiz was murdered by Mexican Mafia members at a Monterey Park nightclub in 1998.

descriptions: Vineland Boys had ties to Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: revealing the Vineland Boys' ties to the Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Byrd Gang has a rivalry with Ghost Gang according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Gang Goonie Gang, Young Melph Mafia St Bernard Projects

descriptions: PIJ and PRC jointly attacked Israel in March 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: PIJ and PRC opened attacks on Israel.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: PFLP formed an alliance with Popular Resistance Committees.
edges.evidence_quote: The PFLP has therefore formed alliances with other leftist groups formed within the Palestinian Authority, including the Palestinian People's Party and the Popular Resistance Committees of Gaza.

descriptions: Cava was part of the Clan dei Quindiciari alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cava, i Graziano ed altre famiglie criminali erano strette in un'alleanza che formava quello che, un tempo, era detto Clan dei Quindiciari.

descriptions: The Cava clan was part of the unified Clan dei Quindiciari along with the Graziano and other families.
edges.evidence_quote: congiuntamente agli attuali rivali dei Cava e ad altre famiglie criminali, formava un unico gruppo camorristico, denominato "Clan dei Quindiciari".

descriptions: Graziano was part of the Clan dei Quindiciari alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cava, i Graziano ed altre famiglie criminali erano strette in un'alleanza che formava quello che, un tempo, era detto Clan dei Quindiciari.

descriptions: The Graziano clan was part of the unified Clan dei Quindiciari along with the Cava and other families.
edges.evidence_quote: congiuntamente agli attuali rivali dei Cava e ad altre famiglie criminali, formava un unico gruppo camorristico, denominato "Clan dei Quindiciari".

descriptions: Barillaro and Romano were allied against Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo in the Ciminà feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Ciminà : a partire dal 4 giugno 1966 ... vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra.

descriptions: Barillaro and Zucco were allied against Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo in the Ciminà feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Ciminà : a partire dal 4 giugno 1966 ... vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra.

descriptions: Frogtown gang originally derived from Varrio White Fence.
edges.evidence_quote: gangs such as the Avenues (AVES), Frogtown (FTR), Hazard (BH), and other sections in the area originally derived from Varrio White Fence.

Solo Angeles.description: An outlaw motorcycle club formed in Tijuana, Mexico in 1959. The club's insignia is a chopper-style motorcycle. It conducts an annual charity run delivering toys to poor children in Tijuana.
